stories.headline: Clifton George jailed for life for murder of Annabel Rook
stories.description: Clifton George stabbed Annabel Rook 31 times before starting a fire at their house in north London.

stories.headline: Italy’s foreign minister slams Israel’s Ben-Gvir over ‘flip-flop’ comments
stories.description: The row erupted after Italy said it was investigating the far-right minister over treatment of Gaza flotilla activists.

stories.headline: Man who asked woman for kiss on train sentenced in legal first
stories.description: David Stroud was convicted in a first-of-its-kind sex-based harassment charge in May.
